name: Black and White Puddings
recipeIngredient: 1 1 oz square semisweet, chocolate, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Vanilla Pudding: In a quart microwave-safe bowl, combine sugar and cornstarch. Stir in milk until well blended and cornstarch is dissolved. Microwave uncovered on high for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring after every minute until it boils and thickens. Add egg and stir until well combined. Reduce heat to medium and cook for 30 seconds, then stir in vanilla extract.
2. Prepare Chocolate Pudding using the same method as Vanilla Pudding, but substitute chocolate extract for vanilla. Stir in chopped chocolate until fully melted and incorporated.
3. Allow pudding mixtures to cool slightly. Pour one quarter of each pudding into separate small dessert bowls. Use a fork to swirl the two colors together. Refrigerate at least 40 minutes before serving. Garnish with berries if desired.
